title: Smoky Gooey Polish Cheese Fritters
description: These smoky, gooey cheese fritters bring a lazy Sunday vibe to your kitchen, combining rich cheddar, creamy cream cheese, and a subtle hint of smoked paprika. Garnished with halved glace cherries, they're a sugar‑free delight that melts in your mouth.
instructions: Whisk eggs, melted butter, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until combined.
Stir in flour until smooth batter forms.
Fold in shredded cheddar and softened cream cheese until evenly distributed.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and lightly oil it.
Drop spoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons) of batter into skillet, flattening gently with a spatula.
Fry 2–3 minutes on each side until golden brown and cheese is gooey inside.
Transfer fritters to paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, topped with halved glace cherries and chopped chives.
Enjoy a smoky, gooey Polish‑inspired snack!
